system.requirement: Your dragon fights with fire and fury.

abilities.description: Roving: Your dragon companion wards off trouble. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by letting it roam, roll +its health. You must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1) once a day to satiate its fierce appetite; otherwise, your @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d34cdf2408cd22b6]{Companion Takes a Hit} (-2).

Trained: The dragon accepts you as a rider; flying under your direction. When you make a move from the saddle to lead an expedition or leverage the dragon as a weapon, you may roll +its health. If you then roll a 1 or 2 on your action die, the dragon must bear the brunt of any cost or counterattack.
Scaled: When you make the @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d34cdf2408cd22b6]{Companion Takes a Hit} move, take +1 momentum on a strong hit.
